title: Non-Small Lung Cancer post surgery treatment???
body:
My mom is 57 years old and has been diagnosed with Non Small Cancer 2 months ago. She had 7.5cm mass on upper left lung and doctor said that two lymph nodes close by were also cancerous but all other scans came back negative(brain, liver, right side of the lung, stomach) they did surgery and removed upper lobe of the left lung as well as two of those lymph nodes and piece of the 6th rib. 
She is supposed to start chemo on Thursday this week but i am skeptical of that because doctor said that her cancer has 75% chance of it coming back and if she does chemo and radiation the percentage changes by 5-10%. We r in the debate here to even do the chemo and radiation. We have heard of Gerson Therapy but that only for patients who have not done any chemo yet. They don’t accept patients who have done any chemo. I am in the debate here and if someone has any info or experience to share please do. My mom is my rock and i dont want her to suffer if there is no real hope with chemo. Any info is appreciated. Thank you
